b.label: triangle weight T_S
b.standard_term: novel per-3-subset weighting function T_S := 1/∏_{m∉S} g_m² used in the triangle/shadow-law decomposition

evidence.label: THEOREM (shadow law + scalar, all n ≥ 3)
evidence.summary:
```
shadow(Q_ν) = s(g)·[(n−2)·I − A₁] ,  s(g) = (Σ_{|S|=3} T_S)/C(n,3)
            = e_3(g²)/(C(n,3)·e_n(g²))
```
Proof. Linearity of shadow over Lemma 3, then Lemma 4; and Σ_S T_S = Σ_S ∏_{m∈S} g_m²/e_n(g²) = e_3(g²)/e_
